mapper.insert: INSERT INTO dispute (order_id, goods_id, applicant_id, respondent_id, reason, type, status) VALUES (#{orderId}, #{goodsId}, #{applicantId}, #{respondentId}, #{reason}, #{type}, #{status})
mapper.select: SELECT d.*, o.order_no, g.title AS goods_title, g.pics AS goods_pics, ua.nickname AS applicant_nickname, ur.nickname AS respondent_nickname FROM dispute d LEFT JOIN orders o ON d.order_id = o.id LEFT JOIN goods g ON d.goods_id = g.id LEFT JOIN user ua ON d.applicant_id = ua.id LEFT JOIN user ur ON d.respondent_id = ur.id WHERE d.id = #{id}

SELECT d.*, o.order_no, g.title AS goods_title, g.pics AS goods_pics, ua.nickname AS applicant_nickname, ur.nickname AS respondent_nickname FROM dispute d LEFT JOIN orders o ON d.order_id = o.id LEFT JOIN goods g ON d.goods_id = g.id LEFT JOIN user ua ON d.applicant_id = ua.id LEFT JOIN user ur ON d.respondent_id = ur.id WHERE d.order_id = #{orderId} ORDER BY d.create_time DESC

SELECT d.*, o.order_no, g.title AS goods_title, g.pics AS goods_pics, ua.nickname AS applicant_nickname, ur.nickname AS respondent_nickname FROM dispute d LEFT JOIN orders o ON d.order_id = o.id LEFT JOIN goods g ON d.goods_id = g.id LEFT JOIN user ua ON d.applicant_id = ua.id LEFT JOIN user ur ON d.respondent_id = ur.id WHERE d.applicant_id = #{applicantId} ORDER BY d.create_time DESC

SELECT d.*, o.order_no, g.title AS goods_title, g.pics AS goods_pics, ua.nickname AS applicant_nickname, ur.nickname AS respondent_nickname FROM dispute d LEFT JOIN orders o ON d.order_id = o.id LEFT JOIN goods g ON d.goods_id = g.id LEFT JOIN user ua ON d.applicant_id = ua.id LEFT JOIN user ur ON d.respondent_id = ur.id WHERE d.respondent_id = #{respondentId} ORDER BY d.create_time DESC

SELECT d.*, o.order_no, g.title AS goods_title, g.pics AS goods_pics, ua.nickname AS applicant_nickname, ur.nickname AS respondent_nickname FROM dispute d LEFT JOIN orders o ON d.order_id = o.id LEFT JOIN goods g ON d.goods_id = g.id LEFT JOIN user ua ON d.applicant_id = ua.id LEFT JOIN user ur ON d.respondent_id = ur.id ORDER BY d.create_time DESC
